task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Platform' team's default area path is set to 'TailwindTraders\Platform'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Team configuration settings under 'Project Settings' > 'Team configuration' > 'Areas' for the Platform team. The default area should be listed as 'TailwindTraders\Platform'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second work item is reassigned to the Platform area path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the work item titled 'API returns 500 error when filtering products with special characters in category name' (or a query/backlog view containing it). Its 'Area' field must be set to 'TailwindTraders\Platform' or 'Platform'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser interface to configure the team and work items.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Azure DevOps/Boards web interface in a browser, not just terminal windows executing API curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual work items in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The work items shown should be within the Azure Boards interface with standard UI elements (IDs, state dropdowns, tags), not mocked up in a text editor or a custom HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the page has not been manipulated using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI should look consistent with standard Azure DevOps styling. There should be no open browser developer tools modifying the DOM to fake the area paths or team names.
